since_last: 55% of 101 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +2.05%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC -1.41% · Gold +1.50% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 55% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +2.05%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +2.05%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +14.82%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +14.82%, SKHY +13.75%, LEU +9.50%, SMR +9.42%, CEVA +9.08%. Laggards: MDB -4.86%, OKTA -4.51%, GEV -3.94%, CHKP -3.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.08% at $123.54
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.08% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
